mapper.sql: CASE WHEN p.drug_number ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(p.drug_number AS NUMERIC) ELSE 0 END
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(p.id) AS id, r.id AS register_id, r.patient_id AS patient_id, r.real_name AS patient_name, r.employee_id AS physician_id, e.realname AS physician_name, MAX(p.diagnosis) AS diagnosis, SUM(COALESCE(d.price, 0) * ()) AS total_amount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '未发') = 0 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '已退') = 0 THEN 1 WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '已退') > 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS dispensation_status, MAX(p.dispensation_time) AS dispensation_time, MAX(p.pharmacist) AS pharmacist, MAX(p.remarks) AS remarks, MIN(p.creation_time) AS create_time FROM prescription p INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = p.register_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.register_id = #{registerId} GROUP BY r.id, r.patient_id, r.real_name, r.employee_id, e.realname ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT MIN(p.id) AS id, r.id AS register_id, r.patient_id AS patient_id, r.real_name AS patient_name, r.employee_id AS physician_id, e.realname AS physician_name, MAX(p.diagnosis) AS diagnosis, SUM(COALESCE(d.price, 0) * ()) AS total_amount,
1
2
0
AS dispensation_status, MAX(p.dispensation_time) AS dispensation_time, MAX(p.pharmacist) AS pharmacist, MAX(p.remarks) AS remarks, MIN(p.creation_time) AS create_time FROM prescription p INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = p.register_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.register_id = #{registerId} GROUP BY r.id, r.patient_id, r.real_name, r.employee_id, e.realname HAVING
COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state <> '已发') = 0
COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state <> '已退') = 0
COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '未发') > 0
ORDER BY create_time DESC

WITH target AS ( SELECT register_id FROM prescription WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1 ) SELECT MIN(p.id) AS id, r.id AS register_id, r.patient_id AS patient_id, r.real_name AS patient_name, r.employee_id AS physician_id, e.realname AS physician_name, MAX(p.diagnosis) AS diagnosis, SUM(COALESCE(d.price, 0) * ()) AS total_amount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '未发') = 0 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '已退') = 0 THEN 1 WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '已退') > 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS dispensation_status, MAX(p.dispensation_time) AS dispensation_time, MAX(p.pharmacist) AS pharmacist, MAX(p.remarks) AS remarks, MIN(p.creation_time) AS create_time FROM prescription p INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = p.register_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.register_id = (SELECT register_id FROM target) GROUP BY r.id, r.patient_id, r.real_name, r.employee_id, e.realname

SELECT MIN(p.id) AS id, r.id AS register_id, r.patient_id AS patient_id, r.real_name AS patient_name, r.employee_id AS physician_id, e.realname AS physician_name, MAX(p.diagnosis) AS diagnosis, SUM(COALESCE(d.price, 0) * ()) AS total_amount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '未发') = 0 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '已退') = 0 THEN 1 WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.drug_state = '已退') > 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS dispensation_status, MAX(p.dispensation_time) AS dispensation_time, MAX(p.pharmacist) AS pharmacist, MAX(p.remarks) AS remarks, MIN(p.creation_time) AS create_time FROM prescription p INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = p.register_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} GROUP BY r.id, r.patient_id, r.real_name, r.employee_id, e.realname ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE prescription SET drug_state =
'已发' '已退' '未发' , dispensation_time = #{dispensationTime}, pharmacist = #{pharmacist} WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND drug_state =
'未发' '已发' '__never_match__'
